channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: It’s been 20 years since the first tweet
item.description: On March 21, 2006, Jack Dorsey posted a simple message: “just setting up my twittr”.

item.title: Clés Windows 11 à quelques euros : ce que vous risquez vraiment
item.description: Windows 11 à 1 € vs 145 € : pourquoi un tel écart et d'où viennent ces clés ? Voici des éléments de réponse.

item.title: The Stunning ‘Expedition 33’ Art Book Is Finally Coming West
item.description: The story of 'Expedition 33' may be over, but its amazing art is still here for you to pore through and put on your bookshelf.

item.title: 'Yasuke became the obvious choice for us to put in the game' — Assassin's Creed Shadows art director on the series' 'first historical protagonist' one year post launch
item.description: Creative director Thierry Dansereau has spoken about the developer of Assassins Creed Shadows on the game's anniversary.

item.title: Comment Microsoft veut mettre fin au « cauchemar » des mises à jour Windows
item.description: Vous vous souvenez de cette mise à jour qui a supprimé votre travail non sauvegardé en plein après-midi ? Ce cauchemar est officiellement sur le point de se terminer. Pavan Davuluri vient de confirmer un changement radical dans la gestion de Windows Update.

item.title: Reddit is weighing identity verification methods to combat its bot problem
item.description: There could be one more step required before creating an account and posting on Reddit in the future. According to Reddit's CEO, Steve Huffman, the social media platform is exploring different ways to verify a user is human and not a bot. When asked by the TBPN podcast how to confirm that it's a human using Reddit, Huffman responded with several verification methods with varying degrees of heavy-handedness. RDDT requiring Face ID was not something I had on my bingo card but something has got to be done about all the fake / botted content — I just don't know how to sell face-scanning to reddito...

item.title: Publisher pulls horror novel ‘Shy Girl’ over AI concerns
item.description: Hachette Book Group said it will not be publishing “Shy Girl” over concerns that artificial intelligence was used to generate the text.

item.title: This paper-like monitor uses a clever trick to cut its power consumption by 80% — Hannspree Hybri uses ambient light and boasts a 75Hz refresh rate
item.description: Hannspree Hybri monitor uses ambient light for paper-like readability, reducing energy use while maintaining standard display performance across varying conditions.

item.title: La Renault électrique à 1 400 km d’autonomie, la BMW Série 3 électrique et BYD qui pourrait anéantir l’industrie européenne – Récap’ Survoltés
item.description: L’actualité Survoltés a été dense cette semaine : BMW qui dévoile la Série 3 électrique à 900 km d'autonomie, on analyse les 1 400 km d'autonomie des voitures électriques Renault face au retour du diesel chez Stellantis, le piège du moteur thermique en Europe qui donnerait les cartes de notre industrie à la Chine.

item.title: What to read this weekend: Revisiting Project Hail Mary and The Thing on the Doorstep
item.description:
Need something new for your reading list? Here are two titles we think are worth checking out. This week, we've got Andy Weir's Project Hail Mary and The Thing on the Doorstep, an H.P. Lovecraft adaptation for Image Comics.
This article originally appeared on Engadget at https://www.engadget.com/entertainment/what-to-read-this-weekend-revisiting-project-hail-mary-and-the-thing-on-the-doorstep-190000250.html?src=rss...

item.title: Oh, the New ‘Absolute Batman’ Villains Are…Kinda Normal?
item.description: Not quite normal men, but hopefully Absolute Batman won't need a chainsaw to go through his childhood buds.

item.title: Ce chargeur de 140 W pouvant accueillir quatre appareils se décharge de 20 % de son prix chez Amazon
item.description: Avec ses quatre ports de charge, l'Anker Zolo peut accueillir de nombreux appareils et les recharger rapidement grâce à sa puissance de charge de 140 W. En ce moment, il connaît une promotion de presque 20 euros chez Amazon.
